name: Copilot Workspace
description: Main application workspace with an AI copilot overlay. Features a toggleable copilot panel that provides context-aware suggestions and chat alongside the primary work surface.

page_briefs.workspace: Primary workspace view with a copilot overlay panel. The main content area displays the user's work surface — items, documents, or dashboards. A toggleable copilot panel slides in from the right edge, containing a chat thread for conversational AI interaction and an anchored input bar. The copilot is aware of the current workspace context and offers proactive suggestions. Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K) toggles the copilot panel.
page_briefs.workspace-detail: Detail view for a specific item within the workspace. A detail header displays the item title, metadata, status, and action buttons. The main content area shows item-specific information. The copilot overlay panel on the right is pre-loaded with context about the viewed item, allowing users to ask questions or request actions related to it. The copilot thread shows contextual suggestions based on the item's state.

shells.copilot-overlay: Main work surface with a toggleable AI copilot panel overlay on the right edge
